Feature_Name: F1AP UE Context Setup for Inter gNB DU LTM Handover
Feature_Description: The gNB-CU has to prepare and send an F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST" message to the candidate gNB-DU. The candidate gNB-DU then has to respond with an F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE" message. This message exchange is handled on the gNB-CU for an Inter gNB DU LTM Handover.

An NG-RAN node UE context is a block of information in an NG-RAN node associated to one UE. This block contains the necessary information required to maintain the NG-RAN services towards the active UE. An NG-RAN node UE context is established in the target NG-RAN node after completion of handover resource allocation during handover preparation.
Feature_Objectives: To establish a UE context in the candidate gNB-DU to support the UE's services during an Inter gNB DU LTM Handover.
To enable the target gNB-DU to maintain NG-RAN services for the active UE by providing necessary UE context information.

Protocol_Layers: F1-U (User Plane, for data bearers associated with the UE context)
Protocol_Interfaces: F1-C (Control Plane interface between gNB-CU and gNB-DU)
F1-U (User Plane interface between gNB-CU and gNB-DU)

Procedure_Implementation_Steps: The provided context does not contain specific, detailed implementation steps for F1AP UE Context Setup Request/Response messages within an 'Inter gNB DU LTM Handover' procedure. General mentions of F1AP UE Context Setup procedures are found in other contexts (e.g., U2N Remote UE Direct-to-indirect Path Switch, SgNB addition, SN Addition, UE Initial Access, Inter-gNB handover), but these are not specific to LTM Handover.
Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: Not applicable for the scoped messages in this procedure.
